articles.title: Ethena and Securitize Detail Plans for Converge: Arbitrum and Celestia Integration
articles.description: TL;DR Converge, the upcoming blockchain developed by Ethena and Securitize, is scheduled to launch its mainnet by the end of Q2 2025. It will leverage Arbitrum’s scalability technology and Celestia’s data availability layer to deliver superior performance with low latency. The network will allow users to pay gas fees with stable tokens like USDe and. . . Read more

articles.title: Secret Service, Canadian Officials Disrupt $4.3M Ethereum “Approval Phishing” Scam
articles.description: The operation reached out to Ethereum wallet holders who had been compromised, whether or not they had already lost crypto.

articles.title: Ethereum Dominance Hits 5 Year Low — Analysts Say It’s the Perfect Entry Point
articles.description: Ethereum’s (ETH) dominance has steadily declined over the past two years. This suggests that investor capital is no longer prioritizing ETH. Instead, funds are likely shifting toward Bitcoin and other altcoins like Solana or XRP. However, analysts see a major opportunity in this situation

articles.title: North Carolina: proposal advances to invest 10% of public funds in Bitcoin
articles.description: The North Carolina House Committee approves the bill authorizing Bitcoin investments for state funds.
